overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Death Stranding showing protagonist Sam Porter Bridges traversing a desolate rocky landscape. The character carries heavy cargo while walking through mountainous valleys, along coastal cliffs during a rainstorm, and wading through shallow water pools in a misty, overcast environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain valley path between cliffs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow rocky valley carrying a large stack of cargo on back

entered.detail: steep dark rock formation forming the left wall of the valley
steep dark rock formation forming the right wall of the valley
hazy mountain peaks visible in the distance beyond the valley
tufts of yellow-brown grass growing between rocks on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky valley flanked by steep cliff walls on both sides. The terrain is dry with sparse patches of yellow grass, and distant mountains are visible through the hazy atmosphere. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character navigates the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff edge overlooking the ocean

events.description: emerges from rocky valley onto coastal cliff with ocean view becoming visible
rain begins to fall, creating visible rain streaks and wet surfaces
character turns left to follow the cliff edge path along the coastline

agents.ego_description: walking along the coastal cliff edge as rain begins to fall, overlooking the ocean while carrying cargo

entered.detail: vast expanse of gray ocean water visible beyond the cliff edge
rocky precipice dropping off to the ocean below
tall ruined structures visible in the misty distance across the water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a wide coastal vista as the character emerges from the valley onto a cliff edge. The ocean stretches out to the right with mysterious ruined towers visible in the distant mist. Rain begins to fall around 18 seconds, creating a wet, atmospheric environment as the character turns left to follow the cliff path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky plateau with shallow water pools

events.description: leaves coastal cliff and returns to inland rocky terrain with water pools
character wades through shallow pools of water on the rocky ground

agents.ego_description: traversing a rocky plateau and wading through shallow pools of water while rain continues to fall

entered.detail: pools of standing water covering parts of the rocky ground
flat rocky plateau with scattered boulders and wet surfaces

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the coast onto a wide rocky plateau dotted with shallow pools of water. The rain continues to fall steadily as the character wades through the water-covered terrain, navigating between rock formations and boulders in the desolate landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined rocky valley that gradually opens into a vast, rain-swept coastal plateau. It begins by following the character from behind through a narrow passage flanked by steep cliffs and sparse yellow grass under a hazy sky. As the character emerges from the valley, the scene expands into a wide coastal vista where the ocean stretches toward distant ruined towers and a steady rain begins to fall. The camera then tracks the character as they turn away from the cliff edge, shifting from the shoreline to a wide, desolate plateau. Finally, the environment transforms into a water-logged landscape as the character wades through shallow pools and navigates between boulders under the persistent rainfall.
